name: health-os
description: Local-first health context with grounded, citation-checked agent workflows

interface.shortDescription: Grounded health context across your own records
interface.longDescription: Health OS gives general-purpose agents a local, versioned health context across multiple systems. It preserves source evidence, exposes coverage gaps, and supports cited memory and record inspection without treating orders, inferences, or missing data as fact.
defaultPrompt: Refresh my health records and tell me what changed
What systems and data does my health record cover?
